title: Book of the Dead, Spell 175: Dialogue with Atum
description: A dialogue with the creator god about the end of the world: eventually everything will return to the primordial waters.
introduction: A dialogue with the creator god about the end of the world: eventually everything will return to the primordial waters.

translation.text: I shall destroy all that I have made. This land shall return to the primordial waters, to the endless flood, as it was in the beginning.
